eas_text: A civil authority has issued A PRACTICE/DEMO WARNING for the following counties or areas: Hawaii; at 6:44 PM on FEB 9, 2019 Effective until 7:44 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
This is only a test of the IPAWS System which is part of the Statewide Alert & Warning System. Always be prepared. Contact Ryan Hirae for IPAWS Technical support @ 808 733 4300
